message:
test(mermaid): add sequence diagram snapshot tests at multiple sizes (bd-2kn9a)

Add 5 new tests:
- Snapshot tests for sequence_basic at 80x24 and 120x40
- Snapshot tests for sequence_stress at 80x24 and 120x40
- E2E layout structure test verifying visible content
Plus 4 blessed snapshot files for deterministic rendering verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
